scripts.docker:humr-base:build: pnpm --filter agent-runtime build && cp -r packages/agent-runtime/dist packages/humr-base/dist && docker build -t humr-base packages/humr-base
scripts.docker:humr-base:start: docker rm -f humr-base 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-base -p 8080:8080 humr-base
scripts.docker:example-agent:build: pnpm docker:humr-base:build && docker build -t humr-example-agent packages/example-agent
scripts.docker:example-agent:start: docker rm -f humr-example-agent 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-example-agent -p 3000:3000 humr-example-agent
